initial_entry.name: Remotely Save
initial_entry.author: fyears
initial_entry.description: Yet another unofficial plugin allowing users to sync notes between local device and the cloud service (S3, Dropbox, webdav).

current_entry.name: Remotely Save
current_entry.author: fyears
current_entry.description: Sync notes between local and cloud with smart conflict: S3 (Amazon S3/Cloudflare R2/Backblaze B2/...), Dropbox, webdav (NextCloud/InfiniCLOUD/Synology/...), OneDrive, Google Drive (GDrive), Box, pCloud, Yandex Disk, Koofr, Azure Blob Storage.

change_history.old_value: Yet another unofficial plugin allowing users to sync notes between local device and the cloud service (S3, Dropbox, webdav).
change_history.new_value: Yet another unofficial plugin allowing users to sync notes between local device and the cloud service (S3, Dropbox, webdav, OneDrive).

change_history.old_value: fyears/remotely-save
change_history.new_value: remotely-save/remotely-save
